title: SellerEligibilityResponse

programType.description: The eBay advertising program for which a seller may be eligible. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

reason.description:
The reason why a seller is ineligible for the specified eBay advertising program.

This field is only returned if the seller is ineligible for the eBay advertising program. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

status.description: The seller elibibilty status for the specified eBay advertising program. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

description: A type that is used to provide the seller's eligibility status for an eBay advertising program.
